item.title: [未监控] [茶之味] The Taste of Tea AKA Cha no aji 2004 1080p DDP4.0 x264-ZoroSenpai[茶之味 / 绿茶之香 / The Taste of Tea / Cha no aji | 评论音轨 / Remastered][23.77 GB][anonymous]
item.description:
🔗 来源: hdhome

📅 发布时间: Wed, 13 May 2026 03:35:11 +0800

⬇️ 详情: https://hdhome.org/details.php?id=291979

📄 原文内容:


                       
◎译　　名　茶之味/绿茶之香/The Taste of Tea
◎片　　名　茶の味
◎年　　代　2004
◎产　　地　日本
◎类　　型　电影
◎类　　别　剧情 / 喜剧
◎语　　言　日语
◎上映日期　2004-07-17
◎豆瓣评分　8.2/10 from 11,337 users
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/1309079/
◎IMDB链接　https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0413893
◎片　　长　143分钟
◎简　　介
　　春野一家人住在宁静祥和的小山村，他们的生活恬淡幸福，不过家族成员却各有各的烦恼。祖父（我修院達也 饰）性格古怪，行为乖张，醉心于私动画的制作；父亲（三浦友和 饰）是一位驻家催眠治疗师，他专心工作，无暇他顾；妻子美子（手塚理美 饰）总算暂时从育子的繁忙生活中解脱出来，于是决定重拾餐桌卡的绘画工作。夫妻俩鲜少交流，隔阂暗生；就读中学的长子阿一（佐藤貴広 饰）恋上新来的转校生，他徘徊犹豫，始终不敢表达；刚上小学的女儿幸子（坂野真弥 饰）总以为自己的头颅在不断变大，这个奇怪的幻想让她倍感困扰。

　　吊儿郎当的叔叔（浅野忠信 饰）从东京回来，为这个平凡却又有些奇怪的家庭吹进一丝生气……

引用 The Taste of Tea AKA Cha no aji 2004 1080p ProRes DD+4.0 x264-ZoroSenpai

File Name.......: The.Taste.of.Tea.2014.1080p.ProRes.DDP4.0.x264-ZoroSenpai.mkv
Chapters........: Yes (Named)
Source(1).......: 1080p WEB-DL LPCM 5.1 ProRes 4:2:2-Entropy (Thanks @Arshia!) (Video)
Source(2).......: JPN TC Entertainment 1080p BluRay REMUX AVC DTS-HD MA 4.0-MiLQ (Thanks @milquesteak & @charliewhite84!) (Audios, Subtitles, Chapters)
Source(3).......: FRA Spectrum Films 1080p Blu-ray AVC DTS-HD MA 5.1 (Thanks!) (Comparison)
Source(4).......: GBR Third Window Films 1080p Blu-ray AVC DTS-HD MA 5.1-ARiN (Thanks @ARiN!) (Comparison)
Source(5).......: 1080p AMZN WEB-DL DD 5.1 H.264-SbR (Thanks @SbR!) (Comparison)
Source(6).......: iTunes WEB (Thanks @vevv!) (Subtitles)
Encoder.........: Roronoa_Zoro@HDB, TBD, BLU

Notes...........:
▣ Source Comparison || Audio Comparison || Comparison

▣ First of all, thanks @milquesteak for the awesome remux & audio notes, his help reduced the time a lot for releasing this one, appreciate it! Now back to the original note at hand. The JPN TC Entertainment & ProRes Master releases provide the director-approved digital remaster. See more info here.
引用 Quoting Ishii Katsuhito:

In creating this digitized remaster, obviously for film festivals, we were showing this film on 35 mm. So we had many prints, but all of the prints had become very scratchy. With that, I knew that it was necessary to digitize the film. So we went to Imagica, which is a film processing place in Japan, and we were able to digitize it. We directed and monitored the process, which included me and the director of photography, Kosuke Matsushima.

While we did make small tweaks to the color, we tried not to change very much about the original. Similarly, this was the same mindset with the sound remastering, as I worked with the sound mixer of the original film. This was to appropriately tweak it and ensure it sounded great. That’s how it came about.


This remaster lacks the strong yellow tint of the old masters. The new grade provides a substantial improvement over the old discs. For the JPN BD release, the encode quality is quite poor, & not particularly detailed, but luckily the ProRes Master doesn't have the issue; it's the best release out of all of the ones available. So, naturally, it was chosen. The dirt lines were a huge issue for this release, covering all four sides, so manual fixing was needed with multiple framing, but it's done & looks great. The 4:2:2 chroma source was converted to 4:2:0 for compatibility. A 10-bit encode was deemed unnecessary as the source did not significantly benefit from higher bit-depth compression. The ProRes Master only has I-frames.

▣ From Remux Notes: Along with the new master came a new 5.1 mix, which is actually 4.0 surround in a 5.1 container. All of the old 5.1 tracks were lossy upmixes, as evidenced by substantial artifacting and combing in the spectrograms. The new 4.0 mix appears to be sourced from an origin...

◎导　　演　尼娅·达科斯塔 Nia DaCosta
◎编　　剧　亚历克斯·加兰 Alex Garland
◎主　　演　拉尔夫·费因斯 Ralph Fiennes (饰 Dr. Kelson)
　　　　　　杰克·奥康奈尔 Jack O'Connell (饰 Sir Jimmy Crystal)

◎片　　长　137分钟
◎导　　演　埃默拉尔德·芬内尔 / Emerald Fennell
◎演　　员　玛格特·罗比 / Margot Robbie (饰 凯茜 Catherine Earnshaw)
　　　　　　雅各布·艾洛蒂 / Jacob Elordi (饰 希斯克利夫 Heathcliff)
　　　　　　周洪 / Hong Chau (饰 内莉 Nelly Dean)
　　　　　　沙扎德·拉蒂夫 / Shazad Latif (饰 埃德加 Edgar Linton)
　　　　　　艾莉森·奥利弗 / Alison Oliver (饰 伊莎贝拉 Isabella Linton)
　　　　　　马丁·克鲁勒斯 / Martin Clunes (饰 恩肖先生 Mr. Earnshaw)
　　　　　　伊万·米切尔 / Ewan Mitchell (饰 约瑟夫 Joseph)
　　　　　　艾米·摩根 / Amy Morgan (饰 齐拉 Zillah)
　　　　　　杰西卡·奈佩特 / Jessica Knappett (饰 巴顿夫人 Mrs. Burton)
　　　　　　夏洛特·梅林顿 / Charlotte Mellington (饰 少年凯茜 Young Catherine)
　　　　　　欧文·库珀 / Owen Cooper (饰 少年希斯克利夫 Young Heathcliff)
　　　　　　薇·阮 / Vy Nguyen (饰 少年内莉 Young Nelly Dean)
　　　　　　 米莉·肯特 Millie Kent (饰 简 Jane)
　　　　　　薇琪·佩珀代因 / Vicki Pepperdine (饰 Sister Mercy)
　　　　　　保罗·瑞斯 / Paul Rhys (饰 Heathcliff's Father)
　　　　　　罗伯特·考西 / Robert Cawsey (饰 Gallows Master)
　　　　　　加布里埃尔·比塞特 / - 史密斯 Gabriel Bisset-Smith (饰 Hangman)
　　　　　　路易·本杰明·波茨 / Louie Benjamin Potts (饰 Urchin 1)
　　　　　　特雷斯顿·布雷恩 / Treyston Braine (饰 Urchin 2)
　　　　　　杰登·伊斯特曼 / Jaydon Eastman (饰 Urchin 3)
　　　　　　安德鲁·查尔斯·戴维斯 / Andrew Charles Davis (饰 Grave Digger 1)
　　　　　　凯文·沃斯 / Kevin Vose (饰 Vicar)
　　　　　　克莱尔·阿什顿 / Claire Ashton (饰 Granny Smith)
　　　　　　斯蒂芬·迈凯 / Stephen Mckay (饰 Mr. Earnshaw's Drinking Friend)
◎编　　剧　艾米莉·勃朗特 / Emily Brontë
　　　　　　埃默拉尔德·芬内尔 / Emerald Fennell
◎制  片  人　汤姆·阿克雷 / Tom Ackerley
　　　　　　皮特·基亚佩塔 / Pete Chiappetta
　　　　　　埃默拉尔德·芬内尔 / Emerald Fennell
　　　　　　安德鲁·拉里 / Andrew Lary
　　　　　　乔西·麦克纳马拉 / Josey McNamara
　　　　　　玛格特·罗比 / Margot Robbie
　　　　　　安东尼·蒂塔内格罗 / Anthony Tittanegro
◎音　　乐　安东尼·威利斯 / Anthony Willis
◎摄　　影　莱纳斯·桑德格伦 / Linus Sandgren
◎选　　角　卡梅尔·科克伦 / Kharmel Cochrane
◎美　　术　苏齐·戴维斯 / Suzie Davies
　　　　　　夏洛特·德瑞克斯 / Charlotte Dirickx
◎服　　装　杰奎琳·杜兰 / Jacqueline Durran
◎化　　妆　Kate Warwick-Oliver Kate Warwick-Oliver
◎简　　介　
　　改编自英国著名作家艾米莉·勃朗特同名经典作品，英格兰北部的荒原之上，一场跨越阶级的禁忌之恋正在上演。庄园之主的女儿凯茜（玛格特·罗比 饰）与被收养的孤儿希斯克利夫（雅各布·艾洛蒂 饰）青梅竹马，灵魂契合彼此深陷。爱意悄然滋长之时，现实的残酷和命运的捉弄却将二人分开。多年以后，他携风暴回来，纯洁的爱火逐渐从浪漫演变为痴狂，谱写了一曲关于欲望、爱与疯狂的史诗篇章。
